'''âv-f-m''' ('''kavafam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tea|tea]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-f-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tea|tea]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-f-m
|-
! Lemma
| kavafam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivafam|thivafam]] || [[word:jivafam|jivafam]] || [[word:shivafam|shivafam]] || [[word:kivafam|kivafam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvafam|thuthuvafam]] || [[word:jujuvafam|jujuvafam]] || [[word:shushuvafam|shushuvafam]] || [[word:kukuvafam|kukuvafam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvafam|thuvafam]] || [[word:juvafam|juvafam]] || [[word:shuvafam|shuvafam]] || [[word:kuvafam|kuvafam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvafam|thuvafam]] || [[word:juvafam|juvafam]] || [[word:shuvafam|shuvafam]] || [[word:kuvafam|kuvafam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevafam|thevafam]] || [[word:jevafam|jevafam]] || [[word:shevafam|shevafam]] || [[word:kevafam|kevafam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovafam|thothovafam]] || [[word:jojovafam|jojovafam]] || [[word:shoshovafam|shoshovafam]] || [[word:kokovafam|kokovafam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovafam|thovafam]] || [[word:jovafam|jovafam]] || [[word:shovafam|shovafam]] || [[word:kovafam|kovafam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovafam|thovafam]] || [[word:jovafam|jovafam]] || [[word:shovafam|shovafam]] || [[word:kovafam|kovafam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvafam|thĂŠvafam]] || [[word:jĂŠvafam|jĂŠvafam]] || [[word:shĂŠvafam|shĂŠvafam]] || [[word:kĂŠvafam|kĂŠvafam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavafam|thathavafam]] || [[word:jajavafam|jajavafam]] || [[word:shashavafam|shashavafam]] || [[word:kakavafam|kakavafam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavafam|thavafam]] || [[word:javafam|javafam]] || [[word:shavafam|shavafam]] || [[word:kavafam|kavafam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavafam|thavafam]] || [[word:javafam|javafam]] || [[word:shavafam|shavafam]] || [[word:kavafam|kavafam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavafam|shavafam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavafam|goshavafam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavafam|gokishavafam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavafamnĂŒ|shavafamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavafamnknĂŒ|goshavafamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavafamnĂŒ|gokishavafamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavafamshĂ«|shavafamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavafamnkshĂ«|goshavafamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavafamshĂ«|gokishavafamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavafamro|shavafamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavafamnkro|goshavafamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavafamro|gokishavafamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavafamu|shavafamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavafamnkmu|goshavafamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavafamu|gokishavafamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavafamsher|shavafamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavafamnksher|goshavafamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavafamsher|gokishavafamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavafamng|shavafamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavafamnkng|goshavafamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavafamng|gokishavafamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavafamya|shavafamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavafamnkya|goshavafamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavafamya|gokishavafamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavafamyam|shavafamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavafamnkyam|goshavafamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavafamyam|gokishavafamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavafamnĂŒshĂ«|shavafamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavafamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavafamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavafamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavafamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavafamnĂŒro|shavafamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavafamnknĂŒro|goshavafamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavafamnĂŒro|gokishavafamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavafamnĂŒmu|shavafamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavafamnknĂŒmu|goshavafamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavafamnĂŒmu|gokishavafamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavafamshĂ«nĂŒ|shavafamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavafamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavafamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavafamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavafamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavafamshĂ«ro|shavafamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavafamnkshĂ«ro|goshavafamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavafamshĂ«ro|gokishavafamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavafamshĂ«mu|shavafamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavafamnkshĂ«mu|goshavafamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavafamshĂ«mu|gokishavafamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavafamronĂŒ|shavafamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavafamnkronĂŒ|goshavafamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavafamronĂŒ|gokishavafamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavafamroshĂ«|shavafamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavafamnkroshĂ«|goshavafamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavafamroshĂ«|gokishavafamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavafamromu|shavafamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavafamnkromu|goshavafamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavafamromu|gokishavafamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavafamunĂŒ|shavafamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavafamnkmunĂŒ|goshavafamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavafamunĂŒ|gokishavafamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavafamushĂ«|shavafamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavafamnkmushĂ«|goshavafamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavafamushĂ«|gokishavafamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavafamuro|shavafamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavafamnkmuro|goshavafamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavafamuro|gokishavafamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
